text.title: react-patterns Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does any state slice need to be read by components more than 2 levels apart?

branch.conclusion: No Context. Use prop drilling. state_routing slices go to "local" or "form" or "server".

branch.question: Does a global store (Zustand/Jotai/Redux Toolkit) already exist in the codebase?

branch.conclusion: Route the slice to the existing global store (layer="global-ui"). Do NOT create a parallel Context.
Create a Context. Initialise with null; memoize value with useMemo; expose via a use<Feature> hook that throws on null. layer="shared-context".

text.example: slice=currentUser, depth=4 levels q-sharing-depth -> true q-external-store -> false => conclusion r4-context-null-sentinel: declare AuthContext + useAuth().
